heading: Returns relating to social security benefits
label: 6050F Returns relating to social security benefits

children.label: A
children.text: aggregate amount of social security benefits paid with respect to any individual during any calendar year,

children.label: B
children.text: aggregate amount of social security benefits repaid by such individual during such calendar year, and

children.label: C
children.text: aggregate reductions under section 224 of the Social Security Act (or under section 3(a)(1) of the Railroad Retirement Act of 1974) in benefits which would otherwise have been paid to such individual during the calendar year on account of amounts received under a workmen’s compensation act, and
the name and address of such individual.

children.heading: Statements to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required
children.label: b Statements to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required

children.text: the name of the agency making the payments, and
the aggregate amount of payments, of repayments, and of reductions, with respect to the individual required to be shown on such return.

children.label: A
children.text: the Commissioner of Social Security in the case of social security benefits described in section 86(d)(1)(A), and

children.label: B
children.text: the Railroad Retirement Board in the case of social security benefits described in section 86(d)(1)(B).

children.heading: Social security benefit
children.label: 2 Social security benefit
children.text: The term “social security benefit” has the meaning given to such term by section 86(d)(1).
